examples: When Moses heard this, he fell facedown.
Abram fell facedown, and God said to him.
Then David and the elders, clothed in sackcloth, fell facedown.
As firefighters and police sifted through the rubble, a child's bed and a refrigerator were visible atop a pile of debris, and a television was facedown in the front yard.
When I wasn't sleeping or submerged in the surf becoming one with a seahorse, I was facedown on a massage table covered in orchid petals with only the slight rumble of my own stomach to awaken me.
